title: HUMAN POTENTIAL IS TOO VALUABLE TO GO UNFED
description: Home › How to Help When our neighbours go hungry, everyone’s potential slips through the cracks. Food banks open doors to a better future for all. title: Let’s Make a Difference Together
description: Home › How to Help › Ways to Support Home › How to Help › Ways to Support Almost 25% of people in Canada are living with food insecurity. You can fuel change. Bring hope and support to your neighbours across Canada by making a donation. Together, we can ensure that everyone in Canada can access the nutritious food they need to reach their full potential. title: Our Partners
description: Home › How to Help › Partner Recognition Food Banks Canada celebrates the loyalty and contributions of our donors through our annual recognition program which represents their giving in the previous calendar year (January-December). We are deeply grateful for our donor’s commitment to relieving hunger today and preventing hunger tomorrow.
